---
title: Forest theme
description: Earthy green palette with amber accents. Nature and sustainability aesthetic.
---

```bash
bun x bosia@latest add theme forest
```

Earthy green palette with warm amber accents, perfect for nature, sustainability, and wellness apps. Deep green primary conveys growth and stability; amber accents add warmth. System font stack — zero web font cost.

## Tokens

- Forest green primary: `142 72% 29%`
- Warm amber accent: `38 92% 48%`
- Earthy greens and tones with organic feel
- `--radius: 0.375rem` (slightly rounded)
- `--font-display` and `--font-body` both system-ui (no web fonts)
- HSL values so Tailwind opacity modifiers work: `bg-primary/80`, etc.

Source: `registry/themes/forest/tokens.css`.
